functions.name: addDockerComposeEnvironment
functions.description: Adds a Docker Compose publishing environment

functions.name: asEnvironmentPlaceholder
functions.description: Creates a Docker Compose environment variable placeholder from a parameter builder

functions.name: configureComposeFile
functions.description: Configures the generated Docker Compose file before it is written to disk

functions.name: configureDashboard
functions.description: Configures the Aspire dashboard resource for the Docker Compose environment

functions.name: configureEnvFile
functions.description: Configures the captured environment variables written to the Docker Compose .env file

functions.name: publishAsDockerComposeService
functions.description: Publishes the resource as a Docker Compose service with custom service configuration
functions.signature: publishAsDockerComposeService(configure: (arg1: DockerComposeServiceResource, arg2: Service) => Promise<void>): IComputeResource

functions.name: withDashboard
functions.description: Enables or disables the Aspire dashboard for the Docker Compose environment

functions.name: withForwardedHeaders
functions.description: Enables or disables forwarded headers support for the Aspire dashboard

functions.name: withHostPort
functions.description: Sets the host port for the Aspire dashboard

functions.name: withProperties
functions.description: Configures properties of the Docker Compose environment
